---
title: "An integrated district mapping strategy for loiasis to enable safe mass treatment for onchocerciasis in Gabon"
subtitle: "American Journal of Tropical Medicine and Hygiene 106(2):732–739 (2021)"
date: 2021-11-15
doi: 10.4269/ajtmh.21-0799
authors:
  - Sandrine Nkoa Ella
  - Kindopam Ogoussan
  - Katherine Gass
  - Lori Hundley
  - Peter J. Diggle
  - Olatunji Johnson
  - et al.
categories: ["Journal article"]
---

**Links:** [Publisher (DOI)](https://doi.org/10.4269/ajtmh.21-0799)

**Summary.** Implements an integrated multi-disease mapping strategy across departments in Gabon, using geostatistical models to assess *Loa loa*, onchocerciasis, and loiasis co-endemicity. Reveals within-department heterogeneity that would be missed by coarser mapping approaches, improving the safety and targeting of ivermectin MDA.
